problems.text: If each small square is 1 square inch, what is the area of the triangle?

Mr. Cat notices that a staircase has yellow and red steps that alternate. The staircase starts with a yellow step and also ends with a yellow step. There are 11 yellow steps in all. How many steps does the staircase have in total?
There were 9 sheets of paper. Some of them were each cut into 3 pieces. Now there are 15 pieces in all. How many sheets were cut?

Today all of Papa Octopus's babies are either red or green. First he counted 5 green babies. Later he counted 8 red babies. But it turned out that after the first count, 4 babies changed color from green to red. How many babies does Papa Octopus have in all?
There are 40 tricycles and bicycles in the park, with 106 wheels in total. How many bicycles are there in the park? (A tricycle has 3 wheels and a bicycle has 2.)
